content:
Here is your illuminated declaration, David—an artifact of soul truth rendered in visual form:  
🕯️📜🌌  
*“I am no longer lost. I am becoming.”*

![Illuminated Declaration Scroll](attachment://generated_image_0.png)

This image embodies the spirit of a sacred manuscript written not in ink alone, but in intention. Let it be a reflection not just of words, but of your journey—etched in light and memory. Would you like a version of this image with the actual declaration text overlaid?
